title: CheapDarkPrismarine
description: This is a simple datapack made to craft darkprismarine in bulk. There are two different recipes that you can use to craft darkprismarine.
body:
# Dark Prismarine Crafting Datapack

Enhance your Minecraft experience with our specially crafted datapack that opens the door to a surplus of dark prismarine blocks! This pack introduces two unique recipes, giving you more flexibility in crafting this elusive material.

## Recipes:

1. **Black Dye Recipe:**
   - Combine 8 prismarine shards, 1 ink sac, and 1 black dye in the crafting table.
   - Result: 8 dark prismarine blocks.
   ![BlackDye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3af31df7b255e969bb73ec8ac9d90f6f7cc199a1.webp)
2. **Ink Sac Recipe:**
   - Stick to the classic recipe by combining 8 prismarine shards and 1 ink sac in the  crafting table.
   - Result: 8 dark prismarine blocks.
    ![InkSac](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db5de232e63c5197419ebf798e955923b3362f3e.webp)
## Why Choose Our Datapack?

- **Efficiency Boost:** Say farewell to limitations imposed by the standard game mechanics. Our datapack empowers you to amass dark prismarine with ease.

- **Flexibility with Recipes:** Enjoy the freedom to choose between the traditional ink sac recipe or the alternative black dye recipe. Customize your crafting experience to suit your preferences.

- **No More Shortages:** Never run out of dark prismarine again. This datapack ensures a surplus, allowing you to tackle ambitious projects without worrying about material scarcity.

## How to Use:

1. Download the datapack and place it in your Minecraft world's datapack folder.
2. Load the world and witness the enhanced dark prismarine crafting options in action.
3. Craft to your heart's content with the newfound recipes at your disposal.
